name: G1 1st Floor — Great Hall to Room 11 Wandering (1-in-8)
description: Wandering monster table for the Great Hall to Room 11 corridor in G1. Encounter frequency: 1 in 8. Roll 1d8; on a 1, roll 1d3 on this table.

results.text: 1–4 hill giants heading for Room 13 from Room 11
1 cloud giant from Room 11 heading for front gate
2 stone giants from Room 11 heading for front gate
